sub_modules.fir_shift_next: Combinational next-state generator for the FIR sample history shift register.
sub_modules.fp_fir_coeff_rom_101: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 binary32 FIR coefficient words.
sub_modules.fp32_math_pkg: Reference placeholder module for shared binary32 math packaging in the decomposition.
sub_modules.fp_fir_mac_101: Combinational 101-tap floating-point FIR multiply-accumulate and binary32 result conversion.
